scripts.deploy:web: cd packages/web && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:tools: sh -c 'if [ -z "${CF_PAGES_TOOLS_PROJECT:-}" ]; then echo "Skip tools deploy: CF_PAGES_TOOLS_PROJECT not set (single-domain mode)."; exit 0; fi; cd tools && npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=${CF_PAGES_TOOLS_PROJECT} --commit-dirty=true'
scripts.db:init: cd packages/worker && npx wrangler d1 execute toolbox-db --file=schema.sql --remote
scripts.db:local: cd packages/worker && npx wrangler d1 execute toolbox-db --file=schema.sql --local
